---
title: "Day 10: Naples to Brindisi"
subtitle: "Scenic Train Through Puglia"
date: "2026-06-14"
day-of-week: "Saturday"
location: "Naples → Puglia (Brindisi)"
categories: [itinerary, travel, naples, puglia]
---

## Overview

**Journey to Puglia:** Long but scenic train ride through southern Italy, entering Puglia and arriving in Brindisi

---

## Morning: Naples Departure (8-10 AM)

### Hotel Checkout

- Final Naples breakfast
- Settle bill
- Get taxi or metro to Napoli Centrale

### Napoli Centrale to Brindisi Train

**See:** [Trains Research - Naples to Brindisi](../research/trains.qmd#route-3-naples-brindisi)

**Train Details:**
- Frecciarossa + possible regional connection
- Duration: 5-6 hours
- Check your booking for exact route/times
- May change in Bari or Caserta

**What to Bring:**
- Snacks and water (long journey)
- Entertainment (book, downloaded movies)
- Charger/portable battery
- Light jacket (AC on trains)

---

## The Journey: Train Through Puglia (10 AM-4 PM)

**The Route (North to South):**

**Leaving Campania:**
- Caserta (Royal Palace visible from station)
- Benevento area

**Entering Puglia (at Foggia):**
- Tavoliere plains
- Endless olive groves
- **Sit on LEFT side** after Foggia for Adriatic coast views

**Through Puglia:**
- Bari (possible connection, ~3.5h from Naples)
- Polignano a Mare (dramatic cliffs visible from train)
- Monopoli
- Ostuni visible in distance (white city on hill)
- **Brindisi** (final stop, ~5.5h from Naples)

**This Journey IS the Tour:**
- Watching Puglia unfold from train window
- Olive groves to horizon
- Whitewashed towns
- Adriatic glimpses
- Southern Italy landscape

---

## Afternoon: Arrive Brindisi (3-5 PM)

### Brindisi Station

**Arrival:**
- Smaller station than Naples/Florence
- 10-minute walk to historic center
- Taxi stand available

### To Hotel

**Options:**
1. **If tour starts today:** Meet tour group (check confirmation)
2. **If tour starts tomorrow:** Check into Brindisi hotel, rest evening

### Evening in Brindisi

**If Staying Overnight:**
- Explore small historic center
- Roman columns by harbor
- Seafood dinner (Adriatic fresh fish)
- Early night (tour starts tomorrow)

**If Meeting Tour Today:**
- Follow tour instructions for meeting point/time
- Likely orientation meeting and welcome dinner

---

## Tour Preparation

**Puglia Tour Starts:**
- Likely June 14 (tomorrow)
- OR possibly this evening with orientation

**Final Checks:**
- Tour confirmation and itinerary
- Meeting point/time understood
- Contact number for tour guide
- Luggage packed for 6 days
- Comfortable shoes ready

---

## Notes

**Train journey impressions:**

**First views of Puglia:**

**Excitement level for tour:**

---

**Previous:** [Day 9](day-09-2026-06-12-naples.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 11: Puglia Day 1](day-11-2026-06-14-puglia.qmd)

**See Also:** [Puglia Overview](../regions/puglia.qmd) for region information
